escalate: ESC expired codes/discount code issues, ask for cart ID and add it in esc notes
Don't send to CS for this client, ESC if needed
For retroactive discount requests add discount % in ESC note
ESC if a customer requests a different resolution, after their escalation was resolved
dos_and_donts: Fun Bucks AREN'T rewards points, those are given during exchanges
promo_and_exclusions: This brand does not use coupon codes or promotions. All of their discounts are exclusively link-based and are applied automatically to the shopping cart upon checkout when the appropriate conditions are met
Please do not advise customers to use promotional codes, do not provide them with any codes, and do not direct them to look on the website for additional codes
They do not have any promotional code text fields on site to facilitate use

conversation.message_text: Halloween Costumes: Welcome to Halloween Costumes! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Halloween Costumes: 
Thanks for subscribing! Shop this link to claim your 15% off. halloweencostumes.attn.tv/aJcNh_Z8OOld
Halloween Costumes: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates!

Halloween Costumes: 
Thank you for your purchase! We're thrilled you chose us! We can't wait for you to enjoy it! halloweencostumes.attn.tv/aNoExOaEWF79

It's for comicon, here in cle. The 13-15th. The girls who voiced mars and moon will be there, but many others too, I just decided to go with tuxedo mask because it'll go with anyone else I choose to get, since it's really just a tux with a couple extra thingsAppreciate the expedited option. I waited too long

Halloween Costumes: Thanks for letting me know! Great choice. I hope it works out. Let me know if you need anything else in the meantime. You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://halloweencostumes.attn.tv/apxEmnF0Ms11

Feel free to take a look at our sale collection here: https://halloweencostumes.attn.tv/aId6r7JmiWCr
Is the hat coming late/tomororw? Isn't it supposed to come with it
Oh, I see, attached, my bad. Thanks
Halloween Costumes: You're welcome. I'm glad to hear that you are all set. Have a great day, and if you have any questions, feel free to send me a text.
Is there a safe way to get all the creases out, from it being folded, I would imagine iron but, do you know if an iron would be ok on any of it
Also, I see the eye mask and the gloves, but, I don't see a rose. Isn't it supped to be included, I haven't fully opened up the whole thing. I'm just sort of looking at it

Halloween Costumes: I understand. Let me check on this with my team, and I'll get back to you as soon as I have more information. I'll keep you updated!

Also, unfortunately, the rose is not included. The costume comes with the following items:

Jacket With Attached Vest Panels
Shirt Front With Attached Bow Tie
Pants
Cape
Top Hat
Eye Mask
Pair of Gloves
Ok, that's fine, I'll have to spring for two then, haha, closer to the date
Halloween Costumes: Alright. I'll be sure to update you. Hang tight!
